item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.6
Accessibility and setup accuracy.
- First-run setup now checks the exact System Audio Recording permission Shruti uses, instead of standing in for it with Screen Recording. If you already allowed audio-only recording, Shruti correctly shows it as granted and stops asking. - The Allow button now prompts for System Audio Recording specifically and opens the right settings list. - VoiceOver now reads every control in the mixer: mute, favorite, effects, output, boost, and the panel buttons all announce what they do and their current state. - Support, Privacy, and Terms links now point to labs.nathanielschool.com instead of a raw hosting URL.
